title: ArmClr Method, Spel Class
parameters: ArmNumber	Integer expression from 1-15.    Arm 0 is the standard (default) robot arm and cannot be cleared.  Arm(s) 1-15 are auxiliary arms defined by the ArmSet instruction.
description: Clears (undefines) an arm for the current robot.
see_also:
ArmSet, GetArm, Tool

ArmClr Example

VB Example:

m_spel.ArmClr(1)

C# Example:

m_spel.ArmClr(1);
